Tissue distribution  One hundred Kunming mice weighed
18-22 g were randomly divided into 10 test groups and 10
control groups with 5 in each group. The nanoparticles of
32P-DNA-PLGA at a dose of 10 m L/g was intravenously
administered to each mouse in test groups, and 32P-DNA at the
same dose was intravenously administered in control groups.
